mapper.select: SELECT * FROM book ORDER BY book_id DESC limit #{start} , #{end}
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET title = #{title}, author = #{author}, publisher = #{publisher}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, category = #{category}, ranking = #{ranking}, review_count = #{reviewCount}, rating = #{rating}, description = #{description}, pages = #{pages}, price = #{price}, book_cover = #{bookCover} WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM book WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY book_id DESC
SELECT * FROM book WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY book_id DESC
